description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a glossy black finish and a contoured double-cutaway body reminiscent of the Fender Stratocaster style. The body features a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a chrome tremolo bridge with an attached whammy bar. The neck is made of light-colored wood, likely maple, with a matching fretboard and dot inlays. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, and the overall construction suggests a classic rock or blues instrument. The guitar's hardware, including the control knobs and pickup selector switch, is visible on the front, while the back is smooth and unadorned except for the neck plate. This instrument is designed for hand-held play and is commonly seen in urban environments such as street performances, music venues, and garages.
description: A glossy black, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a maple neck with six inline tuners. The chrome hardware and classic body shape evoke a Stratocaster-style design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black body, white pickguard, three pickups, control knobs, and the full maple neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the length of the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth black back, neck plate, and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body contour, neck, and the whammy bar extending from the bridge.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a classic Stratocaster-style contour
